# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
      - develop
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    env:
      NODE_ENV: development
      PIP_CACHE_DIR: ~/.cache/pip
      CONFIG_ENV: ci

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            dist
            build
            .turbo
            .cache
            .parcel-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}-${{ hashFiles('.nvmrc', '.node-version', '.npmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.pnpmfile.cjs', 'package.json') }}-${{ env.NODE_ENV }}-${{ env.CONFIG_ENV }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            venv
            **/__pycache__
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            .ruff_cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/setup.cfg') }}-${{ hashFiles('.python-version', 'pip.conf', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}-${{ env.CONFIG_ENV }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/setup.cfg') }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-

      - name: Cache environment-specific configs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env
            .env.*
            config/**
            configs/**
            .npmrc
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnpmfile.cjs
            pip.conf
            .pypirc
            .python-version
            .nvmrc
            .node-version
            tsconfig.json
            jsconfig.json
            babel.config.js
            babel.config.cjs
            webpack.config.js
            vite.config.js
            next.config.js
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('.env', '.env.*', 'config/**', 'configs/**', '.npmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.pnpmfile.cjs', 'pip.conf', '.pypirc', '.python-version', '.nvmrc', '.node-version', 'tsconfig.json', 'jsconfig.json', 'babel.config.js', 'babel.config.cjs', 'webpack.config.js', 'vite.config.js', 'next.config.js') }}-${{ env.CONFIG_ENV }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: hashFiles('**/package.json') != ''
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/Pipfile', '**/setup.py') != ''
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          elif [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
            pip install .
          elif [ -f setup.py ]; then
            pip install .
          fi

      - name: Build
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            if npm run | grep -q " build"; then
              npm run build
            fi
          fi
          if [ -f Makefile ]; then
            make build || true
          fi

      - name: Test
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            if npm run | grep -q " test"; then
              npm test --if-present
            fi
          fi
          if [ -d .venv ]; then
            source .venv/bin/activate
            pytest -q || true
          fi
